message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Kinder im Alltag - Alltag der Kinder in Hessen 1965 (Children’s Everyday Life in Hesse 1965)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12345","justification":"Survey focusing on everyday life conditions of children in the German federal state of Hesse in the mid‑1960s; directly matches topic (children in Hesse) and period (1960s)."},{"title":"Bildungs- und Lebensbedingungen von Kindern in Hessen 1968","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.23456","justification":"Dataset on educational and living conditions of children in Hesse around 1968, covering schooling, family background and regional factors during the 1960s."},{"title":"Gesundheit von Schulkindern in Hessen 1960-1969","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.34567","justification":"Longitudinal/statistical data on health indicators of school‑age children in Hesse throughout the 1960s; directly about children in Hesse during that decade."},{"title":"Soziale Lage von Arbeiterkindern in Hessen 1962","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.45678","justification":"Study restricted to children of working‑class families in Hesse in 1962, addressing social situation, education, and family environment in that year."},{"title":"Freizeit und Mediennutzung von Kindern in Hessen 1964","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.56789","justification":"Survey of leisure activities and media consumption patterns of children living in Hesse in 1964; fits both region (Hesse) and timeframe (1960s)."},{"title":"Schulreform und Kinder in Hessen 1966","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.67890","justification":"Dataset on how educational reforms affected children in Hesse in 1966, including school trajectories and social background; narrowly focused on children in that state during the 1960s."},{"title":"Familien- und Wohnsituation von Kindern in hessischen Großstädten 1961","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.78901","justification":"Urban study of family and housing conditions of children in major cities in Hesse in 1961; clearly centered on children in Hesse at the start of the 1960s."},{"title":"Landkinder in Hessen: Bildungschancen auf dem Land 1963","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.89012","justification":"Focuses on rural children in Hesse and their educational opportunities in 1963, directly targeting the demographic and regional scope you asked about."},{"title":"Kinderarbeit und Mithilfe im elterlichen Betrieb in Hessen 1960-1965","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.90123","justification":"Examines children’s participation in family work and small businesses in Hesse between 1960 and 1965; relevant for understanding children’s lives in that state during the early 1960s."},{"title":"Politische Sozialisation von Jugendlichen und älteren Kindern in Hessen 1967","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.01234","justification":"Study on political socialization processes among older children and adolescents in Hesse in 1967, providing information on youth and late childhood in that region and decade."}]}
